specs.materials: Mesh back (Vion Mesh or Dimension Mesh) or upholstered back, fabric/vinyl/leather seat options, painted/polished aluminum frame
key_features: Five control mechanisms (incl. weight-sensing synchro-tilter, synchro-tilter w/ back angle adjustment)
Halo arm with dual independent 360° rotation (option)
specs.notes: Product-line landing page; per-SKU dimensions in dealer/brochure assets not parsed here
specs.who_its_for: Design-focused professional services firms, hospital administrative suites, and municipalities that want a highly configurable Canadian-made mesh high-back task chair with five mechanism options and two seat-width choices.
